2604.12757.title: GF-Score: Certified Class-Conditional Robustness Evaluation with Fairness Guarantees
2604.12757.paper_summary: Adversarial robustness is essential for deploying neural networks in safety-critical applications, yet standard evaluation methods either require expensive adversarial attacks or report only a single aggregate score that obscures how robustness is distributed across classes. We introduce the \emph{GF-Score} (GREAT-Fairness Score), a framework that decomposes the certified GREAT Score into per-class robustness profiles and quantifies their disparity through four metrics grounded in welfare economics: the Robustness Disparity Index (RDI), the Normalized Robustness Gini Coefficient (NRGC), Worst-Case Class Robustness (WCR), and a Fairness-Penalized GREAT Score (FP-GREAT). The framework further eliminates the original method's dependence on adversarial attacks through a self-calibration procedure that tunes the temperature parameter using only clean accuracy correlations. Evaluating 22 models from RobustBench across CIFAR-10 and ImageNet, we find that the decomposition is exact, that per-class scores reveal consistent vulnerability patterns (e.g., ``cat'' is the weakest class in 76\% of CIFAR-10 models), and that more robust models tend to exhibit greater class-level disparity. These results establish a practical, attack-free auditing pipeline for diagnosing where certified robustness guarantees fail to protect all classes equally. We release our code on \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/gf-score}{GitHub}.
2604.12757.paper_summary_zh: 對抗穩健性對於在安全關鍵應用中部署神經網絡至關重要，然而標準評估方法要麼需要昂貴的對抗攻擊，要麼僅報告單一的綜合得分，這掩蓋了穩健性在各類別之間的分佈。我們引入了\emph{GF-Score}（GREAT-Fairness Score），這是一個將認證的GREAT Score分解為每類別穩健性剖面並通過四個基於福利經濟學的指標量化其差異的框架：穩健性差異指數（RDI）、標準化穩健性基尼係數（NRGC）、最壞情況類別穩健性（WCR）和公平性懲罰的GREAT Score（FP-GREAT）。該框架進一步消除了原方法對對抗攻擊的依賴，通過自我校準程序僅使用乾淨準確性相關性來調整溫度參數。對來自RobustBench的22個模型在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上的評估顯示，分解是精確的，每類別得分揭示了一致的脆弱性模式（例如，“貓”在76\%的CIFAR-10模型中是最弱的類別），而且更穩健的模型往往表現出更大的類別級差異。這些結果建立了一個實用的、無攻擊的審計流程，用於診斷認證的穩健性保證未能平等保護所有類別的情況。我們在\href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/gf-score}{GitHub}上釋出了我們的代碼。
2604.12757.author: Arya Shah et.al.
2604.12757.authors: Arya Shah, Kaveri Visavadiya, Manisha Padala
